title: Design a Distributed Cache
input_format: Key-value pairs to store (set) or keys to retrieve (get)
output_format: Stored values or 'null' if not found/expired
constraints: Support LRU/LFU eviction. Scale to TBs of data across hundreds of nodes. Handle node failures with minimal data loss. Consistent hashing to minimize remapping.
function_signature: class DistributedCache { get(key: string): any; set(key: string, value: any, ttl?: number): void; remove(key: string): void; }
